Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BUILDZOOM, INC.'s Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Defendant Buildzoom, Inc.'s unopposed Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 877.6 (A)(2) is GRANTED IN SUBSTANTIAL PART.

Good cause appearing, the court finds the settlement between Plaintiffs Scot Gensler and Lianne Gensler and Defendant Buildzoom, Inc., entered March 7, 2025, is in good faith within the meaning of Code of Civil procedure sections 877 and 876.6.

This order shall have the effect provided by Code of Civil procedure sections 877 and otherwise provided by law for an order under sections 877 and 876.6.

Any dismissal(s) would flow from the settlement, not this order, and must be separately accomplished by the parties.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

\Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Compelling Arbitration Under California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1281.98 And To Lift Stay\
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS LIANNE GENSLER, SCOT GENSLER'S Motion To Vacate Order Compelling Arbitration Under California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1281.98 And To Lift Stay.

Plaintiff's motion to vacate the order of February 16, 2022, that compelled arbitration and stayed this case is granted. The parties reached an impasse with respect to arbitration and they agree that plaintiff is entitled to this relief per CCP 1281.98(b). The court lifts the stay in this action. Defendant Buildzoom, Inc. shall respond to the complaint within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
